output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
SELECT ?nationality WHERE {
  wd:Q3348415 wdt:P571 ?tourDate .
  FILTER(YEAR(?tourDate) = 2017)
  wd:Q3348415 p:P1001 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P1001 ?participant .
  ?participant wdt:P27 ?nationality .
  ?participant wdt:P31 wd:Q5 .
}
GROUP BY ?participant ?nationality
ORDER BY ASC(COUNT(?statement))
LIMIT 1
output.formatted:

  wd:Q3348415 p:P1001 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P1001 ?participant .
  ?participant wdt:P27 ?nationality .
  ?participant wdt:P31 wd:Q5 .
}
